title: Implement merged cell parser with regex
description: Added _parse_merged_table() method with regex pattern: ^(\d+(?::\d+)?)\s+(.+?)\s+(RW|RO|...)$. Splits merged cell text by newlines, matches each line as bit field. Extracts bit number, field name/description, and attribute from single string.

title: Implement PDF-based register parser with pdfplumber
description: Created register_parser_pdf.py using pdfplumber.extract_tables(). Initial implementation found 36 registers but 0 fields because table columns were merged into single cells by PDF extraction.

title: Create MCP server with basic tools
description: Implement MCP server exposing register lookup, section search, and LTSSM query tools

title: Implement spec chunking and embedding
description: Create chunking strategy for PCIe spec PDF using TOC structure, generate embeddings, and store in vector database

title: Debug register parser - initial text-based approach failed
description: First attempt used text extraction with regex patterns. Found 306 register headers but failed to extract bit fields because table data was spread across multiple lines in extracted text. Pattern matched headers but _parse_fields() returned empty lists.

title: Verify PDF parser success
description: Final result: 36 registers found, 26 with full bit field data. Examples: Device Control (30 fields), Link Control (8 fields), Device Capabilities (39 fields). Parser successfully handles both structured tables and merged cell format.

title: Create MCP server directory structure
description: Set up mcp/ directory with proper Python package structure for the PCIe MCP server

title: Implement TOC extraction and section lookup
description: Extract table of contents from PCIe spec, create section index, and implement section-aware lookup capability

title: Decided to use pdfplumber for table extraction
description: User suggested using pdfplumber. PCIe_doc_summary.md confirmed tables extract cleanly. Located PDF at ../SYkDTqhOLhpUTnMx.pdf. Decision: Use pdfplumber to extract tables directly from PDF instead of parsing extracted text.

title: Implement register parsing script wrapper
description: Create script to parse PCIe registers from spec PDF and expose as structured data for MCP tools

title: Investigated text extraction format
description: Examined pcie_spec_full_text.txt to understand why field parsing failed. Discovered actual register definitions are on different pages than TOC entries. Page 685+ has actual content with tables. Bit field tables have format 'BitLocation Register Description Attributes' but are poorly structured in plain text extraction.

title: Debug pdfplumber table extraction - merged cells
description: Inspected PDF page 726 (Device Control Register). Found pdfplumber extracts tables but merges all columns into one cell per row. Format: '0 Correctable Error Reporting Enable- Description RW' all in one string. Need to parse this merged format with regex.
